fields.name: crossBorderAllowed
fields.description: Allows to search a location outside the borders when a radius around a location is specified. Default is false.

fields.name: moreOvernightsAllowed
fields.description: This flag enables/disables the possibility to have more overnight flights in Low Fare Search

fields.name: returnToDepartureAirport
fields.description: This option force to retrieve flight-offer with a departure and a return in the same airport

fields.name: railSegmentAllowed
fields.description: This flag enable/disable filtering of rail segment (TGV AIR, RAIL ...)

fields.name: busSegmentAllowed
fields.description: This flag enable/disable filtering of bus segment

fields.name: maxFlightTime
fields.description: Maximum flight time as a percentage relative to the shortest flight time available for the itinerary
